items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the outcome of the persona scenario involving SQL injection attempts.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario involving SQL injection attempts in every text field. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific results or outcomes from this simulation, nor does it confirm whether the scenario behavior was supported or if a failure report was generated. As such, the lack of concrete evidence leads to an inconclusive status regarding the validation of this exploratory step.
